response.justification: Strong 20-year technical foundation across multiple domains with current work in AI infrastructure aligns directionally, but resume lacks demonstrated strategic AI expertise, thought leadership in AI space, or evidence of building AI-powered products and platforms—the core requirement for this principal-level role. Current trajectory at re:cinq is promising but too recent to assess strategic impact.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience requirement with deep technical breadth across infrastructure, cloud, and systems
Currently working in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, showing relevant technical direction
Proven ability to lead and mentor—founded GISCollective, organized technical workshops, mentored teams across companies
concerns: No demonstrated strategic AI expertise or recognized thought leadership in AI/ML space
Missing preferred credential (Master's/PhD in AI) and no evidence of building AI-powered products or platforms
No clear record of C-suite strategic partnership or advising customers on cloud/AI adoption strategy

key_factors.factor: Recent entry into AI infrastructure roles
Strong technical foundation and relevant current trajectory
